series_metadata.series_title: Draft documents related to clean-up of hazardous waste facilities
series_metadata.series_description: All documents related to clean-up of hazardous waste facilities, including notes. Includes all corrective action documents, environmental covenant documents, sampling and analysis plans (SAPs)/sampling, analysis and remediation plans (SARPs), site characterization information and closure documents except the final approved versions. If a plan is approved and later gets amended, the amendment is a draft document.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: closure has been certified and agency has accepted closure certification
